description: CompositionKhakhi sleeveless jacket made of 100% cotton, has a mock neck, zippered front placket, zippered insert pockets on either chest, zippered front placket at the waist and quilted liningFittingComfortWash careDo not washDo not bleach, tumble dry or wringIron on lowDry cleanableThe zippered insert pockets and mock neck add smooth styling to this sleeveless jacket from turtle. The quilted lining ensures you stay insulated. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa, making it an environment friendly choice. Team this with shirts or t-shirts and jeans.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
